multi_target_phrase.description: Phrase queries where the phrase exists in multiple relevant locations.

partial_phrase_recovery.description: Snippet recovery with punctuation, casing, or formatting drift.

phrase_sensitive_unquoted.description: Unquoted phrase-like queries where exact or tight in-text dependence likely matters.

quote_snippet.description: Remembered phrase and exact quote retrieval slice.

quoted_exact.description: Explicitly quoted phrase queries that should prefer exact in-text hits.

snippet_memory.description: Remembered sentence-fragment queries without explicit quotes.

tweet_like_short_phrase.description: Very short phrase lookups where exact phrase presence should dominate.
